app.name: Cognitia
app.tagline: Your personal CBT companion — rewire one thought at a time.

dashboard.subtitle: A quiet place to look at your thoughts.
dashboard.empty: No entries yet — your first ABC is one click away.

consequences.title: How are you feeling right now?
consequences.subtitle: Start where it hurts. Pick the emotions you notice and how strong they feel.
consequences.behavior: What did you do, or want to do?
consequences.behaviorPlaceholder: Avoided the call. Stayed in bed. Snapped at someone. Anything counts.

activating.title: What happened?
activating.subtitle: The trigger — the situation that set this off. Just facts.
activating.situationPlaceholder: Describe what happened, like you'd tell a friend.

belief.title: What automatic thought came up?
belief.subtitle: The first thing your mind said. Don't filter it.
belief.thoughtPlaceholder: I'm going to fail. They hate me. I always ruin things.

distortions.title: Which patterns do you notice?
distortions.subtitle: Pick any that fit. You can pick none — this is for you, not a test.

testing.title: Let's test the thought together.
testing.evidencePlaceholder: Just one or two notes is enough.
testing.realityPlaceholder: I'm thinking I'm [X]. Is there proof in my life that I am [X] or feel [X]?
testing.pragmaticPlaceholder: With this thought pattern, will it help me reach my goal (calmness)?
testing.alternativePlaceholder: How else could I do or think to improve the situation?
testing.reframedPlaceholder: The new, more balanced thought you'd like to hold.

summary.title: Here's what you wrote.
summary.subtitle: A small map of one moment.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Patterns over time. Be gentle with what you see.

settings.title: Settings
settings.reminderHelp: When you'd like a gentle nudge to check in.

feedback.title: Therapist feedback
feedback.subtitle: Notes from a therapist, counselor, or trusted reviewer about this entry.
feedback.notePlaceholder: Reflections, questions, or guidance for this entry.

wins.title: Winning moments
wins.subtitle: Small and big wins worth remembering. Come back here when the weather turns gray.
wins.empty: No wins logged yet. Even a small one counts.
wins.cherishEmpty: Log your first win — it will reappear here on a future day.
